verses.latin_vulgate: Emitte agnum, Domine, dominatorem terræ,  de petra deserti  ad montem filiæ Sion.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁלְחוּ־כַ֥ר מֹשֵֽׁל־אֶ֖רֶץ מִסֶּ֣לַע מִדְבָּ֑רָה אֶל־הַ֖ר בַּת־צִיּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Send forth, O Lord, the lamb, the ruler of the earth, from Petra of the desert, to the mount of the daughter of Sion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähettäkäät maaherran karitsat Selasta korven tyköä Zionin tyttären vuorelle.
verses.king_james: Send ye the lamb to the ruler of the land from Sela to the wilderness, unto the mount of the daughter of Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit : sicut avis fugiens,  et pulli de nido avolantes,  sic erunt filiæ Moab  in transcensu Arnon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֥ה כְעוֹף־נוֹדֵ֖ד קֵ֣ן מְשֻׁלָּ֑ח תִּֽהְיֶ֙ינָה֙ בְּנ֣וֹת מוֹאָ֔ב מַעְבָּרֹ֖ת לְאַרְנֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall come to pass, that as a bird fleeing away, and as young ones flying out of the nest, so shall the daughters of Moab be in the passage of Arnon.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta niinkuin lintu lentää pois, joka pesästänsä ajettu on, niin pitää Moabin tyttärelle tapahtuman Arnonin luotuspaikoissa.
verses.king_james: For it shall be, that, as a wandering bird cast out of the nest, so the daughters of Moab shall be at the fords of Arnon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ini consilium,  coge concilium ;  pone quasi noctem umbram tuam  in meridie ;  absconde fugientes, et vagos ne prodas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (הביאו) [הָבִ֤יאִי] עֵצָה֙ עֲשׂ֣וּ פְלִילָ֔ה שִׁ֧יתִי כַלַּ֛יִל צִלֵּ֖ךְ בְּת֣וֹךְ צׇהֳרָ֑יִם סַתְּרִי֙ נִדָּחִ֔ים נֹדֵ֖ד אַל־תְּגַלִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Take counsel, gather a council: make thy shadow as the night in the midday: hide them that flee, and betray not them that wander about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pitäkäät neuvoa yhdessä, sanokaat tuomio, tee sinulles puolipäivän varjo niinkuin yö; kätke pois ajetut, ja älä ilmoita kulkioita.
verses.king_james: Take counsel, execute judgment; make thy shadow as the night in the midst of the noonday; hide the outcasts; bewray not him that wandereth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitabunt apud te profugi mei ;  Moab, esto latibulum eorum a facie vastatoris :  finitus est enim pulvis, consummatus est miser,  defecit qui conculcabat terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָג֤וּרוּ בָךְ֙ נִדָּחַ֔י מוֹאָ֛ב הֱוִי־סֵ֥תֶר לָ֖מוֹ מִפְּנֵ֣י שׁוֹדֵ֑ד כִּֽי־אָפֵ֤ס הַמֵּץ֙ כָּ֣לָה שֹׁ֔ד תַּ֥מּוּ רֹמֵ֖ס מִן־הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: My fugitives shall dwell with thee: O Moab, be thou a covert to them from the face of the destroyer: for the dust is at an end, the wretch is consumed: he hath failed, that trod the earth under foot.
verses.finnish_biblia: Anna minun pois ajettuni asua tykönäs; ole Moab heidän varjeluksensa hävittäjää vastaan; niin vaivaaja saa lopun, kukistaja lakkaa, ja sotkuja taukoo maassa.
verses.king_james: Let mine outcasts dwell with thee, Moab; be thou a covert to them from the face of the spoiler: for the extortioner is at an end, the spoiler ceaseth, the oppressors are consumed out of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et præparabitur in misericordia solium,  et sedebit super illud in veritate  in tabernaculo David,  judicans et quærens judicium,  et velociter reddens quod justum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהוּכַ֤ן בַּחֶ֙סֶד֙ כִּסֵּ֔א וְיָשַׁ֥ב עָלָ֛יו בֶּאֱמֶ֖ת בְּאֹ֣הֶל דָּוִ֑ד שֹׁפֵ֛ט וְדֹרֵ֥שׁ מִשְׁפָּ֖ט וּמְהִ֥ר צֶֽדֶק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And a throne shall be prepared in mercy, and one shall sit upon it in truth in the tabernacle of David, judging and seeking judgment and quickly rendering that which is just.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta istuin valmistetaan armosta yhdelle istua, totuudessa, Davidin majassa, tuomita ja etsiä oikeutta, ja pikaisesti toimittaa vanhurskautta.
verses.king_james: And in mercy shall the throne be established: and he shall sit upon it in truth in the tabernacle of David, judging, and seeking judgment, and hasting righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audivimus superbiam Moab :  superbus est valde ;  superbia ejus, et arrogantia ejus, et indignatio ejus  plus quam fortitudo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁמַ֥עְנוּ גְאוֹן־מוֹאָ֖ב גֵּ֣א מְאֹ֑ד גַּאֲוָת֧וֹ וּגְאוֹנ֛וֹ וְעֶבְרָת֖וֹ לֹא־כֵ֥ן בַּדָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: We have heard of the pride of Moab, he is exceeding proud: his pride and his arrogancy, and his indignation is more than his strength.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta me kuulemme Moabin ylpeydestä, että hän on aivan ylpeä, niin että hänen ylpeytensä, koreutensa ja vihansa on suurempi kuin hänen voimansa.
verses.king_james: We have heard of the pride of Moab; he is very proud: even of his haughtiness, and his pride, and his wrath: but his lies shall not be so.

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco ululabit Moab ad Moab ;  universus ululabit :  his qui lætantur super muros cocti lateris,  loquimini plagas suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן יְיֵלִ֥יל מוֹאָ֛ב לְמוֹאָ֖ב כֻּלֹּ֣ה יְיֵלִ֑יל לַאֲשִׁישֵׁ֧י קִיר־חֲרֶ֛שֶׂת תֶּהְגּ֖וּ אַךְ־נְכָאִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore shall Moab howl to Moab, every one shall howl: to them that rejoice upon the brick walls, tell ye their stripes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden pitää yhden Moabilaisen itkemän toista, heidän pitää kaikkein itkemän; KirHaresetin (kaupungin) perustuksia pitää teidän huokaaman: ne ovat peräti kukistetut.
verses.king_james: Therefore shall Moab howl for Moab, every one shall howl: for the foundations of Kir–hareseth shall ye mourn; surely they are stricken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam suburbana Hesebon deserta sunt,  et vineam Sabama  domini gentium exciderunt :  flagella ejus usque ad Jazer pervenerunt,  erraverunt in deserto ;  propagines ejus relictæ sunt,  transierunt mare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י שַׁדְמוֹת֩ חֶשְׁבּ֨וֹן אֻמְלָ֜ל גֶּ֣פֶן שִׂבְמָ֗ה בַּעֲלֵ֤י גוֹיִם֙ הָלְמ֣וּ שְׂרוּקֶּ֔יהָ עַד־יַעְזֵ֥ר נָגָ֖עוּ תָּ֣עוּ מִדְבָּ֑ר שְׁלֻ֣חוֹתֶ֔יהָ נִטְּשׁ֖וּ עָ֥בְרוּ יָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the suburbs of Hesebon are desolate, and the lords of the nations have destroyed the vineyard of Sabama: the branches thereof have reached even to Jazer: they have wandered in the wilderness, the branches thereof are left, they are gone over the sea.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Hesbon on tullut autioksi maaksi, Sibmassa ovat viinapuut turmellut, pakanain herrat ovat sotkuneet hänen parhaat viinapuunsa, ja tulleet Jaeseriin asti, ja vaeltaneet korpea ympäri; hänen viina-oksansa ovat hajoitetut ja viedyt meren ylitse.
verses.king_james: For the fields of Heshbon languish, and the vine of Sibmah: the lords of the heathen have broken down the principal plants thereof, they are come even unto Jazer, they wandered through the wilderness: her branches are stretched out, they are gone over the sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super hoc plorabo in fletu Jazer  vineam Sabama ;  inebriabo de lacrima mea,  Hesebon et Eleale,  quoniam super vindemiam tuam et super messem tuam  vox calcantium irruit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֡ן אֶבְכֶּ֞ה בִּבְכִ֤י יַעְזֵר֙ גֶּ֣פֶן שִׂבְמָ֔ה אֲרַיָּ֙וֶךְ֙ דִּמְעָתִ֔י חֶשְׁבּ֖וֹן וְאֶלְעָלֵ֑ה כִּ֧י עַל־קֵיצֵ֛ךְ וְעַל־קְצִירֵ֖ךְ הֵידָ֥ד נָפָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore I will lament with the weeping of Jazer the vineyard of Sabama: I will water thee with my tears, O Hesebon, and Eleale: for the voice of the treaders hath rushed in upon thy vintage, and upon thy harvest.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden minä itken Jaeserin tähden, ja Sibman viinapuun, ja vuodatan monta pisaraa Hesbonin ja Elalen tähden; sillä huuto on langennut sinun suvees ja tuloos!
verses.king_james: Therefore I will bewail with the weeping of Jazer the vine of Sibmah: I will water thee with my tears, O Heshbon, and Elealeh: for the shouting for thy summer fruits and for thy harvest is fallen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et auferetur lætitia et exsultatio de Carmelo,  et in vineis non exsultabit neque jubilabit.  Vinum in torculari non calcabit qui calcare consueverat ;  vocem calcantium abstuli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנֶאֱסַ֨ף שִׂמְחָ֤ה וָגִיל֙ מִן־הַכַּרְמֶ֔ל וּבַכְּרָמִ֥ים לֹֽא־יְרֻנָּ֖ן לֹ֣א יְרֹעָ֑ע יַ֗יִן בַּיְקָבִ֛ים לֹא־יִדְרֹ֥ךְ הַדֹּרֵ֖ךְ הֵידָ֥ד הִשְׁבַּֽתִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And gladness and joy shall be taken away from Carmel, and there shall be no rejoicing nor shouting in the vineyards. He shall not tread out wine in the press that was wont to tread it out: the voice of the treaders I have taken away.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin että ilo ja riemu lakkaa kedolla, ja ei viinamäissä iloita eikä huudeta, eli puserreta viinaa kuurnissa; minä olen lopettanut ilohuudon.
verses.king_james: And gladness is taken away, and joy out of the plentiful field; and in the vineyards there shall be no singing, neither shall there be shouting: the treaders shall tread out no wine in their presses; I have made their vintage shouting to cease.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super hoc venter meus ad Moab  quasi cithara sonabit,  et viscera mea ad murum cocti lateris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּן֙ מֵעַ֣י לְמוֹאָ֔ב כַּכִּנּ֖וֹר יֶהֱמ֑וּ וְקִרְבִּ֖י לְקִ֥יר חָֽרֶשׂ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Wherefore my bowels shall sound like a harp for Moab, and my inward parts for the brick wall.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden minun sydämeni kumisee Moabin tähden kuin kantele, ja minun sisällykseni KirHareksen tähden.
verses.king_james: Wherefore my bowels shall sound like an harp for Moab, and mine inward parts for Kir–haresh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit : cum apparuerit quod laboravit Moab  super excelsis suis,  ingredietur ad sancta sua ut obsecret,  et non valebit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֧ה כִֽי־נִרְאָ֛ה כִּֽי־נִלְאָ֥ה מוֹאָ֖ב עַל־הַבָּמָ֑ה וּבָ֧א אֶל־מִקְדָּשׁ֛וֹ לְהִתְפַּלֵּ֖ל וְלֹ֥א יוּכָֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall come to pass, when it is seen that Moab is wearied on his high places, that he shall go in to his sanctuaries to pray, and shall not prevail.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin pitää ilmoitettaman, kuinka Moab on väsynyt korkeuksissa ja mennyt kirkkoonsa rukoilemaan, ja ei kuitenkaan ole mitään aikoin saanut.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, when it is seen that Moab is weary on the high place, that he shall come to his sanctuary to pray; but he shall not prevail.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc verbum quod locutus est Dominus ad Moab ex tunc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֣ה הַדָּבָ֗ר אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶל־מוֹאָ֖ב מֵאָֽז׃
verses.douay_rheims: This is the word, that the Lord spoke to Moab from that time:
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on se, minkä Herra siihen aikaan puhui Moabia vastaan.
verses.king_james: This is the word that the Lord hath spoken concerning Moab since that time.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc locutus est Dominus, dicens : In tribus annis, quasi anni mercenarii, auferetur gloria Moab super omni populo multo, et relinquetur parvus et modicus, nequaquam multus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה דִּבֶּ֣ר יְהֹוָה֮ לֵאמֹר֒ בְּשָׁלֹ֤שׁ שָׁנִים֙ כִּשְׁנֵ֣י שָׂכִ֔יר וְנִקְלָה֙ כְּב֣וֹד מוֹאָ֔ב בְּכֹ֖ל הֶהָמ֣וֹן הָרָ֑ב וּשְׁאָ֥ר מְעַ֛ט מִזְעָ֖ר ל֥וֹא כַבִּֽיר׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And now the Lord hath spoken, saying: In three years, as the years of a hireling, the glory of Moab shall be taken away for all the multitude of the people, and it shall be left small and feeble, not many.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta nyt puhuu Herra ja sanoo: kolmena vuonna, niinkuin palvelian vuodet ovat, pitää Moabin kunnian, joka suuri on kaikissa kansoissa, tuleman pieneksi, niin että aivan vähä pitää jäämän, ja ei paljo.
verses.king_james: But now the Lord hath spoken, saying, Within three years, as the years of an hireling, and the glory of Moab shall be contemned, with all that great multitude; and the remnant shall be very small and feeble.
